verses.latin_vulgate: Quare fremuerunt gentes,  et populi meditati sunt inania ?
verses.king_james: Why do the heathen rage, and the people imagine a vain thing?

verses.latin_vulgate: Astiterunt reges terræ,  et principes convenerunt in unum  adversus Dominum, et adversus christum ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִ֥תְיַצְּב֨וּ ׀ מַלְכֵי־אֶ֗רֶץ וְרוֹזְנִ֥ים נֽוֹסְדוּ־יָ֑חַד עַל־יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה וְעַל־מְשִׁיחֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: The kings of the earth set themselves, and the rulers take counsel together, against the Lord, and against his anointed, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Dirumpamus vincula eorum,  et projiciamus a nobis jugum ipsorum.
verses.king_james: Let us break their bands asunder, and cast away their cords from us.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui habitat in cælis irridebit eos,  et Dominus subsannabit eos.
verses.king_james: He that sitteth in the heavens shall laugh: the Lord shall have them in derision.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tunc loquetur ad eos in ira sua,  et in furore suo conturbabit eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָ֤ז יְדַבֵּ֣ר אֵלֵ֣ימוֹ בְאַפּ֑וֹ וּֽבַחֲרוֹנ֥וֹ יְבַהֲלֵֽמוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Then shall he speak unto them in his wrath, and vex them in his sore displeasure.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego autem constitutus sum rex ab eo  super Sion, montem sanctum ejus,  prædicans præceptum ejus.
verses.king_james: Yet have I set my king upon my holy hill of Zion.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus dixit ad me : Filius meus es tu ;  ego hodie genui te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲסַפְּרָ֗ה אֶֽ֫ל־חֹ֥ק יְֽהֹוָ֗ה אָמַ֘ר־אֵלַ֥י בְּנִ֥י אַ֑תָּה אֲ֝נִ֗י הַיּ֥וֹם יְלִדְתִּֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: I will declare the decree: the Lord hath said unto me, Thou art my Son; this day have I begotten thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Postula a me, et dabo tibi gentes hæreditatem tuam,  et possessionem tuam terminos terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שְׁאַ֤ל מִמֶּ֗נִּי וְאֶתְּנָ֣ה ג֭וֹיִם נַחֲלָתֶ֑ךָ וַ֝אֲחֻזָּתְךָ֗ אַפְסֵי־אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: Ask of me, and I shall give thee the heathen for thine inheritance, and the uttermost parts of the earth for thy possession.

verses.latin_vulgate: Reges eos in virga ferrea,  et tamquam vas figuli confringes eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תְּ֭רֹעֵם בְּשֵׁ֣בֶט בַּרְזֶ֑ל כִּכְלִ֖י יוֹצֵ֣ר תְּנַפְּצֵֽם׃
verses.king_james: Thou shalt break them with a rod of iron; thou shalt dash them in pieces like a potter’s vessel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et nunc, reges, intelligite ;  erudimini, qui judicatis terram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְ֭עַתָּה מְלָכִ֣ים הַשְׂכִּ֑ילוּ הִ֝וָּסְר֗וּ שֹׁ֣פְטֵי אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: Be wise now therefore, O ye kings: be instructed, ye judges of the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Servite Domino in timore,  et exsultate ei cum tremore.
verses.king_james: Serve the Lord with fear, and rejoice with trembling.

verses.latin_vulgate: Apprehendite disciplinam, nequando irascatur Dominus,  et pereatis de via justa.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נַשְּׁקוּ־בַ֡ר פֶּן־יֶאֱנַ֤ף ׀ וְתֹ֬אבְדוּ דֶ֗רֶךְ כִּֽי־יִבְעַ֣ר כִּמְעַ֣ט אַפּ֑וֹ אַ֝שְׁרֵ֗י כׇּל־ח֥וֹסֵי בֽוֹ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Kiss the Son, lest he be angry, and ye perish from the way, when his wrath is kindled but a little. Blessed are all they that put their trust in him.
